title: Translation of EoE credits
wikitext:
[]: Translation of EoE credits?             Quote Post by TBsq » Sun Sep 16, 2018 6:21 am Is there somewhere a translation of EoE's credits? Just curious

[]: Re: Translation of EoE credits?             Quote Post by TBsq » Sat Sep 22, 2018 4:29 am Nothing?

[]: Re: Translation of EoE credits?             Quote Post by Joseki » Sun Sep 23, 2018 3:26 pm You can read the credited staff on Anime News Network https://www.animenewsnetwork.com/encycl ... php?id=419 I don't know if it's 100% accurate tho.

[]: Re: Translation of EoE credits?             Quote Post by TBsq » Fri Sep 28, 2018 10:54 am Thanks but I wanted to know if there are texts in the credits other than the ones mentioning the staff.

[]: Re: Translation of EoE credits?             Quote Post by TBsq » Wed Oct 03, 2018 7:23 pm So nothing?

[]: Re: Translation of EoE credits?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sun Oct 07, 2018 7:51 am It would take a lot of time and research to produce a full translation of such a long list of names. If you want it badly enough and can't do it yourself, you could hypothetically throw money at someone.
